title: CapabilityToken
description: Schema for a NEXUS capability token. Tokens are unforgeable, immutable grants that simultaneously name a kernel object and encode permitted operations (seL4 capability model).

token_id.description: Unique UUID4 for this capability token.

object_id.description: UUID of the kernel object (module, resource, or service) this token grants access to.

permitted_ops.description: Set of operations permitted by this token (seL4-style capability permissions).

issuer.description: Identity of the entity that minted this token (node_id or sovereign_identity).

issued_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when this token was minted.

expiry.description: UTC ISO 8601 expiry timestamp, or null for non-expiring tokens.

delegated_from.description: Optional: UUID of the parent token this was derived from (capability derivation chain).

constraints.description: Optional operational constraints (e.g., rate limits, allowed IP ranges, time windows).

revoked.description: True if this token has been explicitly revoked.
